reasoning: DL-bornan-2-one (camphor) is a bicyclic monoterpenoid ketone derived from the bornane skeleton, consisting of a bicyclo[2.2.1]heptane (norbornane) framework with two methyl groups and a ketone at position 2, classifying it as a bicyclic monoterpenoid. It falls under prenol lipids as a terpenoid built from isoprene units.
